<!-- indicator: fig-pc-trust-hlth-source -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-pc-trust-hlth-source
#| fig-cap: 'Trusted Sources of Health Information for Populations Served, Putnam County (n = 128)'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Trusted Sources of Health Information for Populations Served, Putnam County (n = 128).'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-pc-trust-hlth-source", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
